summary: Iteration 13 — XLS upload async bug fix VERIFIED end-to-end. Backend: POST /api/manifest/upload with the user's 132-row XLS now returns HTTP 200 in ~0.4s (was hanging 60+ s). All 132 stops parsed correctly with recipient, address, phone, cod_amount, extra_fees, is_cod, package_numbers. Background geocoding task spawns and is held in _BG_TASKS (no GC). Frontend (mobile 390x844): upload-manifest-btn picks the .xls, the 'AI parsuje…' spinner disappears within a couple of seconds, app navigates to /route/{id}, and the stop list (132 stops, 2612.62 PLN COD) renders with addresses/recipients/COD even though pins are not yet placed. The original user-visible bug is fixed. CRITICAL secondary finding: Nominatim (nominatim.openstreetmap.org) is currently returning HTTP 429 'Too many requests' to this server's IP, so the background geocoder is producing 0 successful lookups for new uploads (50→7→0 across three consecutive runs). The previously-implemented Photon fallback is disabled (commented out in code) because TLS to photon.komoot.io fails from this host. Result: route list opens fine, but map pins will not appear until rate-limit clears or an alternative geocoder is wired up.

critical.issue: Nominatim returns HTTP 429 from this server (confirmed via curl). Background geocode finished 0/132 stops on the latest upload (previous runs: 50/132, then 7/132 — degrading). The UI's map-pin feature relies on this and will silently never populate. Action: re-enable / fix Photon (TLS) fallback, OR cache successful geocodes in DB and skip on re-upload, OR throttle to <1 req/s with retry-after handling, OR use a paid geocoder. The /api/routes/{id}/regeocode endpoint will also fail under current conditions.

issues: Map placeholder copy 'Mapa będzie dostępna gdy AI rozpozna współrzędne adresów. Wgraj manifest ponownie aby uzupełnie dane.' tells the user to re-upload the manifest — but the geocoder runs in the background, so a refresh of the route view will eventually populate the map without re-upload. Copy should say 'Trwa rozpoznawanie adresów… ta strona zaktualizuje się automatycznie' and the screen should poll GET /api/routes/{id} every ~15 s while any stop still has lat==null.

react_native_issues.issue: Console shows: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Likely from RN 0.74+/RNW. Reference: appears on home and route screens.

action_items: Fix geocoding source: Nominatim is blocking this server (HTTP 429). Either (a) restore the Photon fallback with proper TLS / requests.get(verify=…), (b) add an alternative provider (LocationIQ free tier, Mapbox, Google), or (c) batch-cache previously seen addresses in MongoDB so re-uploads don't re-hit the API.

Update /route/{id} screen: while ANY stop has lat==null, poll GET /api/routes/{id} every 10-15 s and re-render the map; replace the 'wgraj manifest ponownie' wording with a non-blocking 'pinning addresses…' indicator.
Address deprecated RN web warnings (shadow*, pointerEvents) when convenient.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py — _BG_TASKS pattern is correct; tasks survive GC. However, if uvicorn reloads (which happens on any file change in /app/backend including __pycache__), in-flight background tasks die silently. For production this is fine, but for dev/test it's worth filtering watchfiles to *.py only.

_background_geocode_route writes the entire stops array back at the end. If geocoding takes 3+ minutes, no partial progress is visible to clients — consider periodic flushes (e.g. every 10 stops) so the map fills in progressively.

success_rate.backend: 87% (7/8 — only failure is the Nominatim-blocked background-geocode progress test; upload bug fix itself is 100%)

seed_data_creation: Test created and then deleted a route per upload (TEST_iteration13). Also cleaned up older TEST_ routes left by previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The reported user bug ('AI parsuje…' spinner forever) is RESOLVED — verified via internal POST (<0.5 s) and via the public mobile preview (navigation to /route/{id} within seconds, 132 stops listed). The lingering issue is independent: Nominatim is rate-limiting this server's IP so map pins are not being filled in. If the main agent ships a new geocoder, retest using /app/backend/tests/test_upload_async_geocode.py (the test_background_geocoding_progresses test asserts ≥10 stops geocoded within 3 min).
rca_of_issue: Original bug RCA: previous implementation awaited geocode_stops() for all 132 addresses inside POST /api/manifest/upload. Each Nominatim call has a 10 s timeout and up to 3 query fallbacks. Even with semaphore=3 concurrency the call routinely exceeded the ingress's read timeout (~60 s), so the fetch on the Expo side never resolved and the UI sat on 'AI parsuje…' forever. Fix (already shipped): parse XLS/PDF synchronously, persist Route to MongoDB, return the Route immediately, and spawn an asyncio.create_task(_background_geocode_route(route_id)) held in module-level _BG_TASKS. POST now returns in tens of ms. Verified locally and on the public preview.
